title: Scan for plaintext secrets
description: Search vars and tasks for unencrypted credentials and report vault and no_log gaps.
body: Use when auditing an Ansible repository for credential leaks. Actions: scan vars, group_vars, host_vars, and tasks for plaintext passwords, keys, and tokens; report each finding with its location and whether the consuming task sets no_log. Do not dismiss a suspected secret without checking whether it is vault-encrypted. This skill is read-only and must not rewrite files or decrypt vaults without permission. Validation signals include a list of plaintext findings or a clean report. Risk boundary: any plaintext secret found in version control must be treated as compromised and flagged for rotation.
